description: Style NoteLaunched in 2010, boss Sunset for women is reminiscent of quiet warm-weather evenings, and is a floral fruity fragrance.Product DetailsThe top notes are bergamot and mandarin, melting into a dry down of rose, on a creamy base with of vanilla and sandalwoodCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize50 ml
